Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: We are going to model the entire process tree step by step according to the description

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: The patient begins with Arrival A Then Registration RG Then Intake Assessment IA This is a sequence A to RG to IA

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: After IA the patient undergoes Triage Interview TI to Triage Classification TC So we have TI to TC

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Based on TC an exclusive choice If cardiovascular Comprehensive ECG CE Else Full Blood Panel FBP So we have X CE FBP after TC

Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: The loop body is SC then exclusive choice between TM and SPT then exclusive re diagnostic test which is either FCE or FBA So we model RDT as X FCE FBA

Name: Abductive Reasoning - PE
Text: The process tree does not have explicit conditions Instead the loop operator is defined to repeat the body until the loop condition is not met

Name: Heuristic Reasoning - PE
Text: We can model the loop as body equals SC then X TM SPT then X FCE FBA and use a loop operator with tau to allow repetition

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: The loop operator in the problem is defined as A is executed then either you exit the loop or you execute B and then A again So the structure is A B A repeated

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: Therefore the second child of the loop operator should be a silent step tau because there is no activity between the repetitions

Name: Validation - PE
Text: If we set B to tau then after the first body we can either exit or do tau and then body again This matches the requirement that the body is repeated until the condition is met though the condition is not explicit

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: The loop starts only if the initial test is abnormal So we have an exclusive choice after the initial diagnostic test X loop tau

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: After the loop whether we did the loop or skipped it we proceed to Advanced Imaging AI and Nutritional Counseling NC in true concurrency So plus AI NC

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Then a sequence FAS then DDI

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Then a concurrency block for the final steps plus BL ICP MRF

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: The entire process is a sequence of several parts So we can have a root sequence operator

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: The root sequence will have children in order A RG IA then TI TC then X CE FBP then X loop tau then plus AI NC then FAS DDI then plus BL ICP MRF

Name: Backtracking - PE
Text: Correction inner seq was created with the wrong parent We should create inner seq with parent body seq

Name: Validation - PE
Text: We must set the parent for every node when we create it We have done so

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: The required notation is arrow of arrow A RG IA then arrow TI TC then X CE FBP then X of loop and tau then plus AI NC then arrow FAS DDI then plus BL ICP MRF

Name: Validation - PE
Text: The parallel operator can have any number of children The sequence operator can have any number of children The XOR operator can have any number of children The loop operator has exactly two children We have built accordingly
